languages.text: {n}Шквал шипящих разрядов срывается с мехадендритов и корпуса Эоганна, окутывая заговорщика сияющей смертоносной паутиной. В воздухе разливается острый запах озона, причудливо сочетающийся с миазмами горелых волос. На коже пленника один за одним вспухают причудливые багровые рубцы, ветвящиеся в разных направлениях — словно ток прожигает себе путь прямо через его плоть. {/n}

{n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. The biting smell of ozone drifts through the air, mingling with the thick vapour of burning hair. Strange, livid scars swell up on the man's skin one after another, branching in different directions, as if the current were burning its way through his flesh. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Шквал шипящих разрядов срывается с мехадендритов и корпуса Эоганна, окутывая заговорщика сияющей смертоносной паутиной. languages.text: {n}Una serie de descargas siseantes brota de las mecadendritas y el caparazón de Eogunn, cubriendo al prisionero con una telaraña deslumbrante y letal. El punzante olor del ozono llena el aire, mezclándose con el denso vapor del pelo quemado. Unas extrañas cicatrices aparecen en la piel del hombre y se extienden en diferentes direcciones, como si la corriente se abriera paso por su carne quemándola.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的机械触须和躯体迸发出的一连串嘶嘶作响的电流，将那囚犯裹入了一张耀眼而致命的电网。空气中弥漫着刺鼻的臭氧味，与烧焦毛发的浓烟混杂在一起。那人皮肤上不断鼓起一道道诡异的青黑伤痕，向着不同方向分叉蔓延，仿佛电流正在他的血肉中烧出一条条路来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. languages.text: {n}Une série de décharges s'échappent des mécadendrites et de l'enveloppe d'Eogunn pour emmailloter le prisonnier dans une toile lumineuse létale. L'air s'emplit d'une odeur d'ozone qui se mélange à la fumée des poils brûlés. La peau de l'homme se couvre peu à peu d'étranges cicatrices pâles qui partent dans différentes directions, comme si le courant traversait sa chair en la brûlant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. The biting smell of ozone drifts through the air, mingling with the thick vapour of burning hair. Strange, livid scars swell up on the man's skin one after another, branching in different directions, as if the current were burning its way through his flesh. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un mekadentritlerinden ve gövdesinden bir dizi tıslayan salınım yükselerek mahkûmu göz kamaştırıcı, ölümcül bir ağın içine sarıyor. Havaya yayılan keskin ozon kokusu, yanan saçların yoğun buharına karışıyor. Akım etinin içinden yakarak ilerliyormuşçasına adamın cildinde birbiri ardına farklı yönlere doğru dallanan tuhaf, morluğa benzeyen yara izleri kabarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. The biting smell of ozone drifts through the air, mingling with the thick vapour of burning hair. Strange, livid scars swell up on the man's skin one after another, branching in different directions, as if the current were burning its way through his flesh. {/n}

languages.text: {n}エオガンの機械触手と船体から、しゅうしゅうと音を立てる放電が一斉にほとばしり、囚人を眩い致死の網で包み込んだ。焼けつくようなオゾンの匂いが大気に漂い、髪が焦げる濃い蒸気と入り混じる。奇妙などす黒い傷痕が次々と男の皮膚に膨れ上がり、まるで電流が肉を焼きながら進んでいくかのように、四方へと枝分かれしていく。 {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A barrage of hissing discharges surges from Eogunn's mechadendrites and hull, enveloping the prisoner in a dazzling, lethal web. Strange, livid scars swell up on the man's skin one after another, branching in different directions, as if the current were burning its way through his flesh. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine Salve zischender Entladungen aus Eogunns Mechadendriten und seinem Rumpf hüllt den Gefangenen in ein blendendes, tödliches Netz. Der beißende Geruch von Ozon liegt in der Luft und vermischt sich mit dem Geruch von verbranntem Haar. Auf der Haut des Mannes sprießen seltsame Narben, die sich in unterschiedliche Richtungen verästeln, als würde sich die Spannung einen Weg durch das Fleisch brennen. {/n}
